channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: Ron Johnson expresses concern Israel 'coerced' into ceasefire agreement
item.description: Sen. Ron Johnson (R-Wis.) expressed concern Wednesday that Israel was “coerced” into its ceasefire agreement with Palestinian militant group Hamas.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Lawyers of detained South Korean president say he will reject questioning by investigators
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — Lawyers representing South Korea’s impeached president said Thursday he will refuse further questioning after being detained by anti-corruption officials over his ill-fated declaration of martial law last month, maintaining that the investigation is illegal.
item.dc:creator: KIM TONG-HYUNG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 5 killed in Mexican town caught between battling criminal groups
item.description: Schools and some businesses were closed and few people walked the streets of this town south of Mexico’s capital Tuesday, hours after five people were gunned down on the same street where another attack left eight dead just eight months earlier.
item.dc:creator: FABIOLA SÁNCHEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Middle East latest: Israel's Netanyahu says Gaza ceasefire deal is not complete
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said late Wednesday that a ceasefire agreement with Hamas is still not complete and the final details are being worked out.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mediators herald Gaza ceasefire and hostage deal. Israel says final details are in flux
item.description: DOHA, Qatar (AP) — Israel and Hamas have agreed to pause the devastating war in the Gaza Strip, mediators announced Wednesday, raising the possibility of winding down the deadliest and most destructive fighting between the bitter enemies.
item.dc:creator: NAJIB JOBAIN, SAMY MAGDY and JOSEF FEDERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Live coverage: Biden's farewell speech comes on heels of raucous confirmation hearings
item.description: President Biden delivered a somewhat grim primetime farewell speech on Wednesday from the Oval Office to mark the final days of his presidency.
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, The Hill

item.title: Details need to be addressed in Israel-Hamas ceasefire
item.description: When a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas is finalized depends on the handling of specific implementation details
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: UK says a deal on the Chagos Islands won't be finalized until Trump is consulted
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's government confirmed Wednesday that it will not finalize a deal to hand over sovereignty of the contested Chagos Islands to Mauritius until President-elect Donald Trump’s administration is consulted.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Puerto Rico governor asks Trump to intervene after Venezuela's Maduro threatened to invade the US territory
item.description: Puerto Rico Gov. Jenniffer González-Colón asked President-elect Trump to take action after Venezuela's Nicolás Maduro threatened an invasion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: India steps up diplomatic relations with the Taliban as rival Pakistan loses influence in Afghanistan
item.description: India and Afghanistan have taken a significant step in securing their first high-level bilateral engagement. No foreign government, including India, officially recognizes the Taliban regime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russia's top diplomat praises Trump's views on Ukraine conflict
item.description: MOSCOW (AP) — Russia’s top diplomat said Tuesday that Moscow is open for talks with President-elect Donald Trump and praised him for pointing to NATO's plan to embrace Ukraine as a root cause of the nearly 3-year-old conflict.
item.dc:creator: VLADIMIR ISACHENKOV, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: France’s new prime minister says he'll renegotiate a contested plan to raise the retirement age
item.description: PARIS (AP) — France’s new prime minister François Bayrou announced Tuesday the renegotiation of a contested plan raising the retirement age from 62 to 64, in a crucial move to seek more stability for his minority government.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIE CORBET, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Structure discovered in Jerusalem's City of David dates back to the First Temple, study finds
item.description: Archaeologists excavating a site since 2010 uncovered an eight-room structure dating back to the First Temple in 8th century BCE, that included a wine press and more.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: International underwater cable attacks by Russia, China are no ‘mere coincidence’ warns EU’s top diplomat
item.description: Attacks on underwater cables in strategic areas connecting telecommunication lines and power sources in Asia and Europe are suspected to be coordinated attacks by China and Russia.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baby gorilla found in plane cargo recovering at Turkish zoo
item.description: A 5-month-old gorilla rescued from a Turkish Airlines plane's cargo hold is now recovering at a zoo in Istanbul, officials announced Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cease-fire between Israel and Hamas getting closer amid concerns terror group rearming in Gaza
item.description: Israel and Hamas are nearing a cease-fire deal amid escalating death toll; 5 IDF soldiers were killed in Gaza on Monday amid growing warnings that Hamas is rearming.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Significant progress made in talks over Israel-Hamas ceasefire and hostage release, officials say
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — U.S. and Arab mediators made significant progress overnight toward brokering a ceasefire in the Israel-Hamas war and the release of scores of hostages held in the Gaza Strip, but a deal hasn't been reached yet, officials said Monday.
item.dc:creator: VICTORIA EASTWOOD, SAMY MAGDY and JOSEF FEDERMAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Biden says he’s leaving Trump ‘strong hand to play,' defends his record on Afghanistan
item.description: Biden spoke for the last time on U.S. foreign policy and national security, and an issue seen as one of his greatest blunders, the withdrawal from Afghanistan, did not escape mentioning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tsunami alert lifted after magnitude 6.6 earthquake rattles southwestern Japan
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan issued a tsunami advisory on Monday after a magnitude 6.6 earthquake struck the southwest of the country. The public warnings to stay away from coastal areas were later lifted. The agency initially gave the magnitude estimate at 6.9, but later revised it down.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Biden takes victory lap in final foreign policy speech
item.description: Biden is expected to discuss wars in Ukraine, Middle East and aggression from China, Iran and North Korea.
item.dc:creator: Tom Dempsey, NewsNation

item.title: Biden calls for immediate cease-fire in call with Israel's Netanyahu
item.description: President Biden and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu held a phone call on Sunday to discuss the ongoing ceasefire and hostage release negotiations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China's exports in December up 10.7%, beating estimates as higher US tariffs loom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — China’s exports in December grew at a faster pace than expected, as factories rushed to fill orders to beat higher tariffs that U.S. President-elect Donald Trump has threatened to impose once he takes office.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO and ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Canada deploying 60 firefighters to help with California blazes
item.description: In a post on X, Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau said Canada was helping aid the Los Angeles area as several wildfires continue devastating the area.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Family of American hostage in Gaza remains hopeful their son, 21, will return
item.description: Edan Alexander, an American hostage, celebrated his second birthday in captivity after Hamas kidnapped him more than a year ago.
item.dc:creator: Hena Doba, NewsNation

item.title: Black boxes from South Korea plane crash failed to record final 4 minutes, officials say
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — The black boxes of a Boeing jetliner that crashed in South Korea last month stopped recording about four minutes before the accident, South Korean officials said Saturday, possibly complicating investigations into the cause of the disaster that killed 179 people.
item.dc:creator: KIM TONG-HYUNG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Panama Canal administrator pushes back against Trump's assertions of Chinese meddling
item.description: PANAMA CITY (AP) — The administrator of the Panama Canal said Friday that the vital waterway will remain in Panamanian hands and open to commerce from all countries, rejecting claims by President-elect Donald Trump that the United States should take it over.
item.dc:creator: ALMA SOLÍS, Associated Press, NewsNation
